name: Burn Dressing — First/Second Degree

cptCodes.display: Dressings and/or debridement of partial-thickness burns, initial or subsequent; small

diagnoses.display: Burn of second degree of right forearm, initial encounter

otherSuppliesUsed: Bacitracin or silver sulfadiazine, non-adherent dressing, gauze
otherPostInstructions: Daily dressing change; F/U in 2–3 days; cool water rinse for pain at home
